meta.title: Hokkude Video - Hokkude Video Instagram, YouTube & Facebook
meta.description: Hokkude video Instagram, YouTube e Facebook seerondiral. Nayi app ɗo wanaa. Gaawnde e juumde.

hero.title: Mbotiri Video Instagram & Facebook
hero.subtitle: Hokkude Instagram Reels, Facebook e YouTube video jooni jooni. Seerondiral, gaawnde, nayi app.

howto.title: Hol No Hokkude Video
howto.step1_desc: Uddit Instagram, YouTube walla Facebook a natto jokke video.
howto.step2_desc: Soo jokke ɓe e kaaɗe dowayel a fay batu Hokkude.
howto.step3_desc: Suɓo ɓaleendi maa a danndaa video e keccol maa.

result.title: Video Maa Udditi!
result.error: Qaawnude video alaa. Ƴeewa jokke a jokka haa.
result.invalid_url: Soo jokke feewi Instagram, TikTok, Facebook walla YouTube.

faq.title: Ɗo Ɓesngu Naatoo Fota
faq.a1: Eey, seerondiral heddiiɗo. Nayi togge walla app.
faq.a2: Instagram (Reels, Binndanɗe, Stories), YouTube (Video, Shorts), e Facebook (Video, Reels).
faq.a3: Eey. Min ndannda jokke maa walla video. Fof waɗee sahaa feewi.
faq.a4: Alaa. Video ɗe woodi tan mbaawaa hokkude.

trending.title: Video Ɗi Moƴƴiri Yontere Ndee
trending.subtitle: Fay hito YouTube • natto jokke a hokkude

footer.tagline: Hokkude video gaawnde e seerondiral leydi ɗi ndewa.
footer.disclaimer: Kuutorgal ngal ko ngal goɗɗo tan. Hollude sariyaaji hakkunde.
